name: brightbtn
desc: Lobby vertical menu (scene 0x16, group 0x52) ALWAYS-BRIGHT button bar. The 8 buttons are 4-frame state sprites into data/image/gamemenu/menu_parts.tga built by FUN_0051d580; only the atlas Y-row differs per state: frame0 y=0x209 RGB(74,135,213) bright glossy 'active'; frame1 y=0x2a2 medium; frame2 y=0x26f RGB(11,50,93) DARK 'disabled' (== live-observed RGB17,77,140); frame3 y=0x23c pale 'hover'. Runtime draws the DARK frame2. Repoint frames 1/2/3 to frame0's bright row so the bar is bright in every state (state-independent, same-length imm32 UV-Y swap). RE: tracer agent a72139. To use the PALE/lightest look instead, set all patchedHex to 3c020000 (frame3).

patches.note: frame2 UV-Y 0x26f(DARK, the live-shown state) -> 0x209(bright). mov [esp+0xac],imm32 (load-bearing)
